sentences.text: Hans asked in a shy and timid voice, 'Do you think it would be unfriendly if I said I was busy?'
The Miller replied, 'Well, I don't think it's much to ask, especially since I'm going to give you my wheelbarrow, but if you refuse, I'll go and do it myself.'
Hans felt a bit guilty because the Miller was always so kind to him.
He decided to help the Miller, even though he really wanted to work in his own garden.
